channel.title: Bloomberg Green Global
channel.description: Últimos artigos de Bloomberg Green Global

item.title: Sweltering Heat Dome Threatens US Holiday Plans, Power Grids
item.description: A searing heat dome will push electricity demand across the eastern US toward record levels over the July 4 holiday, testing power grids as air conditioners run full tilt on a busy World Cup weekend.
item.dc:creator: Naureen S Malik, Joe Wertz

item.title: Southern Europe Battles Wildfires as Heat Wave Threat Grows
item.description: More than 2,000 firefighters are battling to contain wildfires that have ravaged homes and campsites in southern France, forcing thousands to evacuate.
item.dc:creator: Joe Wertz, Nayla Razzouk

item.title: Heat Dome Searing US East Coast Pushes Swifties to Stay Home
item.description: The extreme heat engulfing New York and US East Coast is straining power grids as holiday weekend begins
item.dc:creator: Joe Wertz, Naureen S Malik

item.title: South Africa Loses Case to Prevent Export of Rhino Horns
item.description: The South African government’s appeal to overturn a ruling allowing the export of horns from captive rhinos was dismissed by the Northern Cape High Court on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Antony Sguazzin

item.title: How Coal Is Winning a Net Zero Role in China’s Energy Transition
item.description: Policymakers see coal as a necessary bridge to the nation’s clean-energy future.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Rudgard

item.title: Free Permits, Emissions Cap Divide EU-UK in Carbon Link Talks
item.description: Talks between the UK and the European Union on linking their carbon markets as part of a post-Brexit reset are exposing differences over issues including free permits and the British emissions cap.
item.dc:creator: Ewa Krukowska, Jorge Valero

item.title: EIF Invests €40 Million Into Danish Climate Venture Fund
item.description: The European Investment Fund is committing €40 million to a Danish venture capital fund investing in early-stage climate technologies across Europe in a bid to strengthen regional energy security.
item.dc:creator: Sara Sjolin

item.title: StanChart Targets Mid-Sized African Companies for Debt Sales
item.description: Standard Chartered Plc said a $50 million green bond it placed last month for a solar home system financier opens the way for a slew of debt sales by mid-sized African companies.
item.dc:creator: Antony Sguazzin

item.title: UK Apartment Owners Are Getting Locked Out of Money-Saving Green Tech
item.description: Leaseholders have limited control over the place where they live, including how it’s heated and powered.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Rudgard

item.title: China’s Net Zero Strategy Relies on an Unlikely Tool: Lots of Coal
item.description: The central government sees coal as an essential bridge to a clean-energy future. Some regions are motivated to extend its use as long as possible.
item.dc:creator: Autor não encontrado
